descriptionHtml:
Sealine SC 39 for sale 2005 | 2 Cabins Version | Tax Paid | Well Equipped

Engine hours (940 hours only)

If you are searching for a reliable and well-maintained cruiser, this Sealine SC 39 for sale 2005 is a noteworthy option currently on the market. She is in good condition, having been carefully looked after, and comes with plenty of thoughtful touches and a complete inventory for comfortable cruising. The Sealine SC 39 offers a nice blend of performance, luxury, and practicality, making her ideal for both family holidays and getaways with friends.

(Autopilot, Radar, Generator, Inverter, AC, Bow Thruster...)

General Specifications

  • Length: 11.96m
  • Beam: 3.71m
  • Draft: 1.10m
  • Weight: 8,800kg
  • Displacement: 10,000kg
  • Tax Paid
  • Fuel Capacity: 1082 litres
  • Fresh Water Capacity: 380 litres
  • Cruising/Maximum Speed: 32 knots
  • Cabins: 2
  • Heads: 2
  • Engines: 2 x Volvo Penta D6-310 (310hp each), 2005 with only 940 hours
  • Berthing Paid Until: 1st May 2026
  • Antifouling (2 coats): Hempel Mille Nero
  • Renovation completed: July 2025
  • Next engine service: May 2026 (scheduled)
  • Fuel tanks filled

The yacht is ready for immediate use, with newly installed outdrives, a freshly serviced engine and antifouling carried out recently, reflecting her overall good condition.

Layout and Accommodation

  • Cabins:
    • Master Bedroom: features an ensuite bathroom, ensuring privacy and comfort.
    • Guest Bedroom: two single beds, convertible into a large double bed with a top mattress, also with its own bathroom.
  • Galley/Kitchen:
    • Induction cooktop (2 units)
    • Whirlpool Cook30 30L microwave
    • Isotherm refrigerator
    • Krups coffee machine
    • All necessary kitchenware (glasses, plates, cups, cutlery, pots)
    • Electric food processor
  • Saloon/Sitting Area:
    • Sofa can be converted into an additional sleeping area
    • TV screen + remote control
    • Brown linen and black & white Calma House and Calvin Klein cushions

Additional Features

  • Electrical windlass (anchor at bow)
  • Fenders and mooring lines
  • Sunbathing cushion
  • Bath and beach towels
  • Summer/winter duvets, pillows, beddings
  • Electric radiator, iron & ironing board
  • Freezer on wheels
  • Handheld and standard vacuum cleaners
  • 5 life jackets
  • Folding tables and chairs (2 of each)
  • Miscellaneous safety and security items
  • Winter and summer tarpaulins

Maintenance & Upgrades

Recent maintenance includes installation of new outdrives, professional antifouling with two coats, full fuel tanks, and regular engine servicing. The next engine revision is already scheduled for May 2026. Port berthing fees are covered up to May 2026, adding to the value for a potential buyer.

Noteworthy Details

A practical feature of this Sealine SC 39 for sale 2005 is the cockpit seat, which slides back to expand the cockpit space by an extra 66cm, perfect for entertaining or relaxing at anchor.

Conclusion

If you are seeking a well-presented and thoughtfully equipped motor yacht, this Sealine SC 39 for sale 2005 is a solid choice for anyone looking to enjoy memorable days on the water with peace of mind and comfort. Contact us now!
